message:
feat(daemon): wire dolt backup sync into daemon ticker

The syncDoltBackups() code existed but was never wired into the daemon
main select loop. Adds a dedicated ticker (15min default) alongside
the existing remotes push ticker. Also adds DoltBackupConfig type
with string-based interval parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
